problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Liquid crystal elastomer actuation may resolve What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
